title: Upon Punchin. Epig.
content:
Give me a reason why men call
    Punchin a dry plant-animal.
    Because as plants by water grow,
    Punchin by beer and ale spreads so.
meaning:
"Upon Punchin. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
